text: I was charged twice for my subscription this month. Please refund one of the charges immediately.
My account is locked and I cannot log in. I tried resetting my password but the email never arrived.
I think someone might have unauthorized access to my account. I see suspicious logins from another country.
The app keeps crashing when I try to upload a profile picture. It shows a 500 error code.
I need help with my recent order. It hasn't arrived yet.
I suspect fraud on my credit card. Someone used it for a purchase on your platform that I didn't authorize.
How do I change my billing address? I am moving to a new apartment next week.
I'm having trouble with the service. It's not working as expected.
Urgently need access to my data. The platform says my file is corrupted after the last update.
I would like a refund guaranteed for the downtime yesterday. My account must be restored immediately.
